channel.title: Arch Linux on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Arch Linux on Cyber Security & Linux | Murat Kurkoglu - orioninsist

item.title: Fix Sway Volume Keys & Binding Warnings for Good
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: A definitive guide to configuring volume keys in the Sway window manager on Arch Linux. Learn to use pamixer and fix the 'Overwriting binding' warning for good.
